source_jobs.title: Staff Fullstack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Staff Full Stack Engineer
About Andela:
At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 10 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.

Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.

Are you an exceptional, hungry leader seasoned in scaling businesses through transformation and growth? Join us and change the world.

Job Summary:

Andela is transitioning from a world-class talent marketplace into a high-scale, AI-integrated Talent Cloud. As a Staff Full-Stack Engineer on our Internal Product team, you aren't just maintaining a platform; you are architecting the engine that powers the global remote economy. You will own the technical evolution of our proprietary Ruby on Rails ecosystem—solving deep-stack challenges in matching logic, global payments, and automated vetting. This is a role for a "player-coach" who thrives on solving complex problems with elegant code and long-term architectural vision.

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama, servant leader: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Player-coach: You fly high (create strategy) AND low (know the details that matter). You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities:

 - System Architecture: Lead the architectural evolution of Ruby on Rails applications, ensuring they remain performant, maintainable, and secure as they scale.

 - Full-Stack Execution: Deliver high-quality code across the stack, utilizing Ruby on Rails on the backend and modern frontend frameworks (typically React) on the frontend.

 - Performance Optimization: Identify and resolve bottlenecks in the Rails stack (e.g., N+1 queries, indexing, caching strategies) and optimize overall system latency.

 - Technical Leadership: Act as a force multiplier by conducting rigorous code reviews, defining CI/CD standards, and mentoring other engineers in the Andela community.

 - Strategic Partnership: Work closely with stakeholders to translate product vision into technical roadmaps, navigating trade-offs between speed and technical debt.

Requirements:

 - Experience: 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 5 years focused on Ruby on Rails.

 - Backend Mastery: Exper

source_jobs.title: AI Solutions Manager
source_jobs.description:
AI Solutions Manager

About Andela:

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 10 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.

Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.

Are you an exceptional, hungry leader seasoned in scaling businesses through transformation and growth? Join us and change the world.

Job Summary:

The AI Solution Manager drives the strategy and commercialization of assigned AI solutions, transforming custom programs into scalable, high-margin Solution Packages.

This is a strategic and commercial role combining product management, go-to-market, and partnerships, requiring strategic thinking, commercial acumen, and technical fluency.

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama, servant leader: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Player-coach: You fly high (create strategy) AND low (know the details that matter). You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities (by weight):

 1. Solution Strategy & IP Development (40%): Design scalable Solution Packages (50-70%+ margin, outcome-based), define roadmaps, capture IP/build playbooks for 10X faster deployment, and define solution scope/success criteria.

 2. Commercialization & Go-to-Market (40%): Create sales enablement (battle cards, ROI calculators, training), design pricing (T&M → outcome-based), define ICPs, support demand generation, and identify "lighthouse customers."

 3. Partnerships & Ecosystem (20%): Identify and cultivate strategic technology (AWS, Databricks, LLM platforms) and SI (Accenture, Deloitte) partnerships; develop co-marketing/co-selling motions; represent Andela in thought leadership.

Success Metrics:

 - 90 Days: Approved solution strategy, sales enablement complete, 2-3 lighthouse customers engaged.

 - 6 Months: First Solution Package (alpha) launched, $500K-$1M pipeline, 3-5 reference case studies, 1-2 partnerships activated.

 - 12 Months: Solution Package matured (beta/final), $2M-$5M revenue, 50-70%+ margins, solution becomes a competitive differentiator.

Required Qualifications:

 - Experience: 8-12 years in solutions consulting, product management, or GTM, with 5+ years in B2B enterprise software/services

Toronto, Canada
New York City, NY

Reporting to the Head of AI Solutions Incubation, the Solution Engineer is Andela's technical solutions lead. This hands-on role involves embedded customer engagement for discovery, solution architecture, building proof-of-concepts (POCs), and securing technical wins. You bridge customer needs with Andela's delivery capability.

This is a high impact, 0-to-1 opportunity, executive visibility, strong market timing, career growth, and mission-driven global team.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities (Time Allocation):

 - Solutions Discovery & Scoping (25-30%): Lead discovery, map workflows, identify pain points, document technical environments, and assess feasibility.

 - Solution Architecture & Design (20-25%): Design custom architectures, create technical diagrams, and develop/present technical proposals.

 - Proof-of-Concept Development (20-25%): Build working POCs with production-quality code, integrate with customer systems, and iterate based on feedback.

 - Technical Leadership (10-15%): Own the technical win, provide expertise, and build customer confidence.

 - Delivery Handoff & Support (20-30%): Scope size and composition of delivery team. Transfer context to the delivery team, support kickoff, and monitor critical phases.

 - Product Feedback Loop (5-10%): Identify solution gaps, propose new Solution Packages, and share competitive intelligence.

 - Indicative Time Allocation: 60-70% Pre-Sales; 20-30% Delivery Handoff; 5-10% Feedback.

source_jobs.title: Head of AI Solutions Delivery
source_jobs.description:
HEAD OF AI SOLUTIONS DELIVERY




ABOUT ANDELA

Andela is transforming from a talent marketplace into an AI services leader, building a differentiated position at the intersection of elite technical talent and cutting-edge AI solutions. We're growing our revenue exponentially through a blended model of optimized staffing, solutions delivery, and platform innovation. Our AI Solutions business is a strategic growth area with ambitious scaling plans and a mandate to redefine how enterprises build and deploy production AI systems.




THE OPPORTUNITY

We're seeking a Head of AI Solutions Delivery to build and lead the operational backbone of our rapidly scaling AI Solutions (outcome-oriented) business. This is a pivotal role for someone who thrives at the intersection of rigorous process discipline and entrepreneurial agility; someone who can establish world-class delivery standards while simultaneously adapting to the dynamic realities of a net-new, high-growth business.

You’ll be responsible for ensuring every customer engagement delivers exceptional outcomes: high CSAT, healthy margins, and demonstrable quality. You’ll do this through intelligent systems, scalable processes, and a culture of continuous improvement. The role requires someone who can be the “adult in the room” and the innovative voice pushing boundaries at the same time.




HOW THIS ROLE FITS

The Head of AI Solutions Delivery is a peer to the Head of AI Solutions, who leads our AI Solutions Managers and AI Solutions Architects (our Forward-Deployed Engineering function). Together, these two functions form the operating backbone of AI Solutions: AI Solutions builds the technical solution and embeds with the client. Delivery builds the program management muscle, methodology, and operational systems that make those engagements predictable, profitable, and scalable.

This role inherits Andela’s existing AI Solutions delivery team and is responsible for scaling it with a new generation of program managers who combine traditional PM rigor with technical and industry fluency. The expectation is straightforward: program managers in this function understand the AI technology they ship and the industries their clients operate in. Generic PM skills are table stakes, not the differentiator.

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you. If it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Team-player: You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this by proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details that matter.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Build Delivery Excellence Infrastructure

 - Design and implement delivery frameworks, methodologies, and governance structures that scale AI Solutions revenue by several orders of magnitude over the next 24 months

 - Establish clear SOPs, AI-specific quality gates (eval frameworks, model performance thresholds, hallucination controls), and risk management protocols while maintaining flexibility for client-specific needs

 - Create metrics, dashboards, and reporting systems that provide real-time visibility into delivery health, margin performance, and customer satisfaction

 - Co-develop delivery playbooks for co

source_jobs.title: Product Operations
source_jobs.description:
Staff Product Operations
About Andela:

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 10 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.

Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.

Are you an exceptional, hungry leader seasoned in scaling businesses through transformation and growth? Join us and change the world.

Job Summary:

The Staff Product Operations role is the connective tissue between Engineering, Operations, Sales, and Leadership and beyond. You will be the person who sits in an Ops team standup in the morning, translates what you heard into a product brief by noon, and tells the story back to the whole organization in a way that makes everyone feel like they are part of the same mission. You find the gap, close it, and move on to the next one.

This is not a program-management role and it is not a seat-warmer. It is a high-hustle, high-judgment role for someone who gets energy from being the glue that holds a complex organization together. You thrive in ambiguity, you translate fluently between technical and non-technical worlds, and you measure your own success by whether the teams around you are moving faster and feeling more connected than they were before you showed up.

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama, servant leader: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Player-coach: You fly high (create strategy) AND low (know the details that matter). You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Direct experience in a two-sided or multi-sided marketplace (talent, e-commerce, logistics, or similar). You understand liquidity, matching dynamics, and supply/demand tension intuitively.

 - A track record of manual processes by building features -- and knowing when it was not yet time to build. You have strong opinions on this, loosely held.

 - ‘Fly the plane’ during technical migrations or major company transitions. You know what is going on at all times and how to keep things on track. You know what "scope protection" means because you have lived it.

 - Exceptional communication and storytelling. You can walk out of an engineering architecture review and explain what it means for the sales te

As the Staff Product Designer, you are a visionary leader who shapes how millions of people experience the future of work. You will tackle Andela’s most ambiguous product challenges, working across high-level business strategy and deep user empathy. You aren't just a "maker"; you are a "shaper" who defines the frameworks, logic, and standards that the rest of the design team follows.

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Experience Architecture: Lead the design of complex, multi-sided marketplace flows. You will be responsible for the "big picture" logic of our Talent Cloud, ensuring seamless transitions between client hiring needs and talent career growth.

 - Strategic Partnership: Act as a peer to Product and Engineering. You will help define the product roadmap by identifying user-centric opportunities that align with Andela’s commercial goals.

 - Design Systems Governance: While you aren't writing the code, you are the "Source of Truth" for our design language. You will oversee the evolution of our component library to ensure accessibility, consistency, and a world-class aesthetic.

 - Data-Informed Innovation: Use qualitative research and quantitative data to validate your hypotheses. You should be comfortable navigating complex data dashboards to find the "why" behind user behavior.

 - Mentorship & Craft Excellence: Elevate the output of the design team through rigorous design reviews, workshops, and the introduction of new methodologies.

source_jobs.title: Sr Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About Andela

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 10 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

Join us and change the world.

About the Role

Andela is seeking a strategic sales professional with 7-10 years’ experience in tech services and/or SaaS providers. You will drive new business across industry sectors - meeting clients' evolving technology needs. Our demand generation team will also support you with marketing materials and programs to generate interest that you and your SDR will work to qualify but you should expect to generate the majority of your own opportunities.

Exceptional Leadership

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company, you do not need to manage people to be a leader at Andela! Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Team-player: You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this by proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details that matter.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities

Cross-Industry Prospecting & New Business:

 - Target and engage senior decision-makers across multiple industry sectors through targeted outreach, sector-specific campaigns and strategic networking to buy Andela services.

Full Sales Cycle Management:

 - From discovery to close, run high-impact demos, deliver tailored marketplace value propositions, negotiate deals, and guarantee seamless onboarding.

Territory Development:

 - United States

Market Insight & ICP Optimization:

 - Deeply understand industry-specific pain points—e.g., talent shortages in AgenticDLC, digital transformation skills shortages, and use those to refine ICP and GTM strategies.

Cross-functional Engagement:

 - Collaborate with marketing, product, delivery, and customer success teams to ensure focused messaging, seamless client experience, and solution alignment.

CRM & Pipeline Strategy:

 - Accurately manage and forecast pipeline across multiple industries using your CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot), ensuring efficient funnel progression and sector segmentation.

Account Growth:

 - Identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling, track account performance, and ensure long-term client loyalty.


QUALIFICATIONS

A strong ability to cultivate value driven conversations across complex cross functional teams is required. If you love digital transformation and working with some of the most admired global organizations and brands, this is a wonderful opportunity!

 - Actively participating and contributing to Sales Team related standups and meetings.

source_jobs.title: Director, Global People Operations & Total Rewards

Job Summary:

As the Director, People Operations & Total Rewards, you will serve as the primary architect of our global internal HR infrastructure, transforming complex organizational needs into streamlined, automated, and scalable workflows. By bridging the gap between high-level strategy and operational rigor, you will own the evolution of our tech stack, integrating HiBob, Deel, Paylocity, and Carta, while safeguarding the business through SOC2 compliance, robust SOP frameworks, and the delivery of competitive global Total Rewards.

Your mission is to eliminate operational friction and ensure data integrity, building a world-class People Ops engine that empowers a global workforce while maintaining the agility of a mid-size tech company on the precipice of growth.

Reporting to the VP, People, you’ll run a tight ship and inspire a team of 3 People Operations specialists.



Exceptional Leadership

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company, you do not need to manage people to be a leader at Andela! Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.



Key Responsibilities

System Optimization & Automation

 - Infrastructure Integration: Lead the end-to-end integration and optimization of our core People tech stack (HiBob, Deel, Paylocity, Carta), ensuring seamless data flow, minimal manual intervention, and a true single source of truth.

 - HRIS Strategy & Data Governance: Own the People systems architecture, including data integrity, access governance, and scalable design to support global growth and reporting needs.

 - Process Automation & AI Enablement: Identify and implement automation opportunities across People Operations, leveraging technology and AI to increase speed, accuracy, and team efficiency.

Andela is transitioning from a world-class talent marketplace into a high-scale, AI-integrated Talent Cloud. As an Assessment Software Engineer you will build new assessment content, making existing assessment content robust to AI and AI-enabled.

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama, servant leader: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Player-coach: You fly high (create strategy) AND low (know the details that matter). You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Create and test new scenarios collaboratively with our team and users

 - Create and update rubrics

 - Help us shape the scenario creation process

 - Influence priority of a backlog /roadmap of requested scenario changes

 - Improve our existing scenarios

 - Implement scenario or rubric changes based on candidate feedback

Qualifications

 - 3+ years professional experience in software engineering

 - Proficient with Ruby on Rails

 - Familiarity with statically typed languages like C++, C#, Java, Go, or Rust

source_jobs.title: Sr Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About Andela

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 10 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.



As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.



Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.



Join us and change the world.



About the Role

Andela is seeking a strategic sales professional with 7-10 years’ experience in tech services and/or SaaS providers. You will drive new business across industry sectors - meeting clients' evolving technology needs. Our demand generation team will also support you with marketing materials and programs to generate interest that you and your SDR will work to qualify but you should expect to generate the majority of your own opportunities.



Exceptional Leadership

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company, you do not need to manage people to be a leader at Andela! Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Team-player: You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this by proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details that matter.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.



Key Responsibilities

Cross-Industry Prospecting & New Business:

 - Target and engage senior decision-makers across multiple industry sectors through targeted outreach, sector-specific campaigns and strategic networking to buy Andela services.

Full Sales Cycle Management:

 - From discovery to close, run high-impact demos, deliver tailored marketplace value propositions, negotiate deals, and guarantee seamless onboarding.

Territory Development:

 - United States

Market Insight & ICP Optimization:

 - Deeply understand industry-specific pain points—e.g., talent shortages in AgenticDLC, digital transformation skills shortages, and use those to refine ICP and GTM strategies.

Cross-functional Engagement:

 - Collaborate with marketing, product, delivery, and customer success teams to ensure focused messaging, seamless client experience, and solution alignment.

CRM & Pipeline Strategy:

 - Accurately manage and forecast pipeline across multiple industries using your CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot), ensuring efficient funnel progression and sector segmentation.

Account Growth:

 - Identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling, track account performance, and ensure long-term client loyalty.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 7+ years of B2B enterprise sales experience at a technology servi

source_jobs.title: Accountant
source_jobs.description:
About Andela:

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 10 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.

Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.

Join us and change the world.

Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Accountant to join our Financial Reporting team. In this role, you will be a key player in our financial ecosystem, bridging the gap between Egypt-specific statutory requirements and international accounting operations for our African subsidiaries. You will ensure the integrity of our general ledger, drive a timely monthly close, and manage critical tax compliance.



Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama, servant leader: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Player-coach: You fly high (create strategy) AND low (know the details that matter). You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this without micromanaging, empowering your team while actively engaging in important details.

 - Business problem solver. You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities

Egypt Statutory & Compliance

 - Tax Management: Ensure prompt filing and payment of monthly statutory returns, specifically VAT and WHT.

 - Income Tax: Collaborate with tax consultants to ensure accurate Income Tax filing and submission before cut-off dates.

 - Audit Coordination: Coordinate and lead all Egypt Tax Authority (ETA) audits.

 - Cross-Functional Support: Support the HR team with social insurance authority coordination and the legal team with external lawyer management.

International & Corporate Accounting

 - Month-End Close: Prepare monthly close processes, including month-end schedules and reconciliations for various subsidiaries.

 - Complex Reconciliations: Perform bank postings, bank reconciliations, and monthly intercompany reconciliations with other Andela entities.

 - Payables & Cash Management: Manage accounts payable, vendor payments, and petty cash disbursements in line with company policy.

 - Fixed Assets: Perform quarterly fixed asset verification and reconciliation.

 - Process Improvement: Support the development of reporting processes, procedures, and internal controls to maintain an efficient flow of financial transactions.

 - Audit Support: Provide documentation and support during both internal and external audits for respective subsid

Andela is transitioning from a world-class talent marketplace into a high-scale, AI-integrated Talent Cloud. As a Data Analyst you will build and maintain the data infrastructure that powers Andela's business intelligence and analytics capabilities. This role requires someone who thinks about data as a product, ensuring data is reliable, accessible, and structured to enable self-service analytics across the organization

Proactive Business Partnership

Analytics & Insights Generation

 - Build dashboards, reports, and analytical frameworks that enable ongoing business monitoring

 - Conduct deep-dive analyses on business performance, customer behavior, and operational efficiency

 - Develop forecasting and predictive models to support strategic planning and resource allocation

 - Synthesize complex data into compelling narratives that drive stakeholder action

Experimentation & Measurement

 - Partner with business teams to design experiments that test new strategies, products, or processes

 - Establish success metrics, tracking mechanisms, and analytical approaches for each initiative

 - Analyze experiment results with statistical rigor and deliver clear go/no-go re

source_jobs.title: Head of Learning Solutions
source_jobs.description:
About Andela:

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 12 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.

Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.

Are you exceptional and hungry to work in a scaling business through transformation and growth? Join us and change the world.

Job Summary

Andela’s Solutions organization designs and delivers AI, Cloud, Data, and Learning solutions for enterprise clients. The Learning Solutions Manager owns learning as a solution vertical within this portfolio — responsible for identifying and validating opportunities, designing programs, building commercial repeatability, and driving measurable client outcomes.


This is not a traditional L&D role as the Head of Learning Solutions. You operate like a product and business leader: validating demand, designing for outcomes, packaging for scale, and iterating on data. You will start as an individual contributor with scope to build a team as the vertical matures. You’ll work closely with our key partners like GitHub, OpenAI and Anthropic. And you’ll team with a variety of cross functional teams including Talent Operations, Delivery, Sales, Partnerships, and Marketing.

Exceptional Leadership

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company, you do not need to manage people to be a leader at Andela! Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Team-player: You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this by proactively collaborating with your team while actively engaging in important details that matter.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.

Key Responsibilities
Solution Discovery & Incubation (~30%)

 - Identify and validate enterprise learning opportunities through market research, competitive analysis, client engagement, and signals from Andela’s Talent Network

 - Design learning solution concepts targeting reskilling needs across AI/ML, Cloud, Data, and Software Engineering domains — with AI as the primary focus

 - Build business cases including market sizing, competitive positioning, pricing models, and revenue projections

 - Lead proof-of-concept programs demonstrating measurable learner outcomes and client ROI

 - Present solution investment recommendations to cross-functional leadership

Solution Design & Technical Leadership (~30%)

 - Define curriculum architecture, assessment frameworks, hands-on

source_jobs.title: Payroll Analyst
source_jobs.description:
About Andela:

At Andela, we know brilliance is evenly distributed around the world, but opportunity is not. For over 12 years, Andela has connected its customers with top global, remote technical talent from over 135 countries with the majority residing in emerging markets like Africa and Latin America.

As one of the world’s largest talent marketplaces, Andela gives companies greater flexibility to quickly deploy qualified technologists. With talent highly skilled in advanced technologies to support Application Development, Artificial Intelligence, Cloud & DevOps, Data Engineering, and much more, customers experience 33% faster project delivery. The company’s exclusive AI-powered platform, Andela Talent Cloud, is the industry’s only unified platform managing the complete global talent lifecycle and enables customers to fill individual roles or engage fully managed teams up to 66% faster.

Andela is on the precipice of two breakout industry transformations: one in staffing/hiring and the other in software development, both accelerated by generative AI.

Join us and change the world.

 

About the role:

As a Payroll Analyst, you will be responsible for processing all aspects of Technologist Payroll. As part of your role within Talent Operations, you will be working closely with different departments to increase performance efficiency and ensure smooth processing of payroll cycles and other payments.

You will be part of a small but mighty team of Operations Associates in charge of providing operational support to our Technologists. Our mission is to ensure that all Technologists have the best experience during their journey with Andela.

 

Exceptional Leadership:

As an Andelan, you’ll serve as a role model for the rest of the company. Think about the feedback your peers typically give you – if it usually sounds like the below, we want to hear from you.

 - Low ego, low drama, servant leader: You share credit, take blame. You like being wrong because it means someone else had an even better idea.

 - One team mentality: You break silos across teams. You put the company and mission first above your team alone.

 - Great listener, hungry for feedback: You’re always seeking to improve – our product, our business, yourself. You solicit diverse opinions and deeply listen.

 - Owner, not renter: You see a problem, you fix it or find someone who will. The buck stops with you.

 - Player-coach: You fly high (create strategy) AND low (know the details that matter). You roll up your sleeves and get scrappy. You do this without micromanaging, empowering your team while actively engaging in important details.

 - Business problem solver: You’re not just a functional expert; you consistently get praise for approaching your function through the lens of solving business problems.



Responsibilities:

The specific responsibilities of the Payroll Analyst position include:

 - Process monthly payroll and other payments for our Technologists; roughly 400 people

 - Work with company database programs to process payroll and maintain personnel database regarding salaries, rate increases and bonuses;

 - Report to department supervisor regarding daily activities and issues. Prepare reports to relevant departments and/or leadership about payroll and expenses;

 - Work directly with other departments to achieve organizational goals as required;

 - Assist with the analysis of business situations and later implementation around optimization;

 - Address and resolve inquiries from Technologists and other stakeholders relating to the payroll/payments.



Requirements:

 

 - Have at least 3-5 years of experience working in Human Resources, Payroll and Payments, technology consulting or software product management company;

 - Knowledge of payroll, different types of payroll software, garnishments and benefits distribution; Salesforce, G-Suite, Scripts proficiency preferred

 - Experience processing payroll at a high volume

 - Experience processing g

notes: Andela is a talent marketplace with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, with a strong focus on AI and remote work.
